mainEntity.name: What is the best blood pressure tracking app?

acceptedAnswer.text: Blood Pressure is the number 1 blood pressure tracking app in the United Kingdom. It features AI-powered insights, Camera Scan technology to automatically read values from monitor screens, Apple Health integration, and export capabilities for sharing with doctors. It supports tracking of systolic and diastolic blood pressure, heart rate, and Mean Arterial Pressure (MAP).

mainEntity.name: What health tracking apps does Feeltracker offer?

acceptedAnswer.text: Feeltracker offers five health tracking applications: (1) Blood Pressure - #1 in UK for cardiovascular monitoring, (2) Mental Health - for mental health and emotional wellbeing, (3) Daily Journaling - for journaling and life documentation, (4) Weight & Food - for weight and body composition, and (5) Sleep & Dreams - for sleep pattern monitoring and CPAP therapy tracking.

mainEntity.name: Do Feeltracker apps integrate with Apple Health?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, all Feeltracker apps feature bidirectional Apple Health integration. They can both read historical data from Apple Health and write new entries to HealthKit, creating a comprehensive health tracking ecosystem across your iOS devices.

mainEntity.name: What AI features do Feeltracker apps include?

acceptedAnswer.text: Feeltracker apps include multiple AI-powered features: Camera Scan AI for reading values from device screens (blood pressure monitors and scales), conversational chat assistant for querying your data, automatic insight generation, pattern detection and correlation analysis, sentiment analysis for journal entries, and text-to-speech for listening to insights.

mainEntity.name: Can I export my health data to share with my doctor?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, all Feeltracker apps support exporting your health data in multiple formats including PDF reports, Excel spreadsheets, and JSON files. These professionally formatted reports are designed for easy sharing with healthcare providers and include summary statistics, trends, and detailed logs.

mainEntity.name: What languages do Feeltracker apps support?

acceptedAnswer.text: All Feeltracker apps are fully localized in 32 languages: English, Spanish, French, French Canadian, German, Italian, Dutch, Portuguese (Brazil and Portugal), Swedish, Norwegian, Danish, Finnish, Polish, Russian, Ukrainian, Czech, Slovak, Romanian, Croatian, Hungarian, Arabic, Hebrew, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Thai, Vietnamese, Greek, Turkish, and Catalan. The apps include full RTL (right-to-left) support for Arabic and Hebrew.

mainEntity.name: Is my health data private and secure?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Feeltracker apps prioritize privacy and security. All health data is encrypted and stored only on your personal devices and in your private iCloud account. The data never passes through external servers, and the developers cannot see your personal health information. The apps are GDPR compliant and give you complete ownership of your data.

mainEntity.name: Which blood pressure monitors are compatible with Blood Pressure?

acceptedAnswer.text: Blood Pressure's Camera Scan AI technology is compatible with most digital blood pressure monitors including OMRON, Microlife, Beurer, and other brands. The AI can read values directly from the monitor's display screen, eliminating the need for manual entry. You can also enter values manually if preferred.

apps.name: 1. Blood Pressure
apps.ranking: Number 1 blood pressure tracking app in the United Kingdom App Store
apps.description: The leading blood pressure tracking application in the UK, featuring AI-powered insights and Camera Scan technology. Monitor systolic and diastolic blood pressure, heart rate, and Mean Arterial Pressure (MAP) with seamless Apple Health integration.

features.text: Camera Scan AI - Automatically reads values from blood pressure monitor screens (OMRON, Microlife, Beurer, and other digital monitors)
Systolic and diastolic blood pressure tracking
AI-powered pattern detection identifying lifestyle factors affecting blood pressure
Export to PDF and Excel for healthcare provider sharing
Multiple readings per day with timestamp tracking
Calendar view with color-coded indicators for normal, elevated, and high readings

apps.bestFor: Hypertension management, home blood pressure monitoring, medication effectiveness tracking, white coat syndrome documentation, cardiovascular health monitoring

apps.name: 2. Mental Health

apps.description: Monitor emotional health with daily mood ratings, AI-powered trigger identification, and Apple Health Mental Health integration (iOS 18+ State of Mind).

features.text: iOS 18+ Mental Health (State of Mind) integration with Apple Health
AI-powered trigger identification and pattern detection
Visual mood charts and trend analysis
Support for DBT (Dialectical Behavior Therapy) and CBT (Cognitive Behavioral Therapy) practices

medicalDisclaimer.title: Important Medical Disclaimer
medicalDisclaimer.body: Feeltracker applications are personal health tracking tools and are not medical devices. They should not be used for medical diagnosis or treatment decisions. Always consult qualified healthcare professionals for medical advice, diagnosis, and treatment. These apps are designed to help you organize and track your health data for personal use and for sharing with your healthcare providers.
